data.title: Fidelity reviewer success_measurable dimension rejects valid observability-based success criteria that cannot be verified within the closing session
data.description: The Agent Clarity reviewer's success_measurable dimension scores below 4 when a success criterion describes a validation mechanism that runs post-delivery (e.g., dogfooding sessions, post-delivery audits) rather than within the session that closes the epic. This forces epics to either drop post-delivery validation criteria or contort them into session-verifiable form, which undermines the intent of observability-based success criteria. The reviewer should accept success criteria that ensure the right observability is in place to monitor success, even when the actual measurement happens after the epic closes.
